# PERF-027 positive: bytes.Buffer allocated on hot path with no sync.Pool
lang: go
file: PERF-027-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "bytes"

func EncodeChunks(chunks []string) string {
	var out bytes.Buffer
	for _, c := range chunks {
		buf := bytes.Buffer{}
		buf.WriteString(c)
		out.Write(buf.Bytes())
	}
	return out.String()
}
